webSearch.tooltip: Search for this venue on Google
webSearch.cannotSearch: Cannot search: venue has no name or address

editPanel.googleTitle: Search the web for this place. Do not copy info from 3rd party sources!

shortcuts.description: Run Place Harmonizer on selected venue

settings.webSearchNewTab: Open URL & Search Results in new tab instead of new window
settings.disablePhoneValidation: Disable automatic phone number validation and formatting
settings.showDuplicates: Show duplicate venues on map (red circles with count)
settings.enableIaZoom: Enable zoom & center for places with no address
settings.enableAddressInference: Suggest missing addresses from nearby road segments
settings.hidePlacesWiki: Hide "Places Wiki" button in results banner
settings.hideReportError: Hide "Report script error" button in results banner
settings.hideServicesButtons: Hide "Web Search" and "Open URL" buttons in results
settings.hidePurWebSearch: Hide "Web Search" button on PUR popups
settings.excludePlaDupes: Exclude parking lots when searching for duplicate places
settings.showPlaExitWhileClosed: Always ask if cars can exit parking lots
settings.addAddresses: Add detected address fields to places with no address
settings.autoLockRpps: Lock residential place points to region default

keyboard.title: Keyboard Shortcut
keyboard.inputTitle: Enter a single letter (A-Z) to trigger the shortcut

links.placesWiki: Open the WME Places Wiki page

highlighter.title: Highlighter Settings:
highlighter.colorHighlighting: Enable color highlighting of map to indicate places needing work
highlighter.disableRank: Disable highlighting for places locked above your rank
highlighter.disableWhitelist: Disable Whitelist highlighting (shows all missing info regardless of WL)
highlighter.plaTypeFill: Fill parking lots based on type (public=blue, restricted=yellow, private=red)

whitelist.pullSuccess: Whitelist exported to text box. Press Ctrl+C to copy.
whitelist.label: Whitelist string:
whitelist.mergeTitle: Merge the string into your existing Whitelist
whitelist.pullTitle: Pull your existing Whitelist for backup or sharing
whitelist.shareTitle: Share your Whitelist to a public Google sheet
whitelist.stateFilterTooltip: Remove all WL items for a state
whitelist.stateFilterPrompt: Enter the 2-letter state abbreviation to remove (e.g., CA, TX):

moderators.intro: Moderators are responsible for reviewing chain submissions for their region. If you have questions or suggestions regarding a chain, please contact any of your regional moderators.
moderators.empty: Moderator list not available yet. Refresh data to load the latest list.

messages.sdkMissing: WME SDK unavailable on this page
messages.ready: Place Harmonizer ready – select a place and press Shift+Alt+A

errors.label: Error:
errors.operationFailed: Error: {{operation}} failed. Check console for details.

addressInference.noSegmentsNearby: No road segments nearby to infer address from

update.failedParseHoursForVenue: Failed to parse opening hours for venue {{venueId}}

parkingLot.exitWhileClosed: Verify if cars can exit this parking lot while closed

gasStation.unknownBrand: Brand "{{brand}}" not found in PNH database. May need review.

bank.missingHours: Bank missing opening hours (required, banks are not 24/7)

postOffice.zipPrompt: USPS location may need ZIP code in description
postOffice.alias: Consider adding "Post Office" as alternate name

stadium.verifyLayout: Stadium/Arena: Verify entry points and parking areas are correctly mapped
stadium.urlMissing: Stadium/Arena should have official website URL

hospital.verifyEntrance: Hospital: Verify emergency entrance is correctly placed
hospital.phoneRequired: Hospital should have phone number for emergencies

warehouseClub.gasStationSeparate: Warehouse club gas station should be a separate place from main store
warehouseClub.pharmacySeparate: Warehouse club pharmacy should be a separate place from main store
warehouseClub.missingHours: Warehouse club should have opening hours (member-only hours may differ)

pnh.name: Apply chain-standard name
pnh.outOfRegion: PNH data exists but is not approved for this region
